_README: Values are in thousands of dollars (FFIEC convention).
Initial values are derived from cache/cdr/2025-Q4.zip — i.e. they reproduce
what the parser will extract on ingest. This makes validate-statements give a
useful signal on day one (parser correctness, schema mapping correctness).
To strengthen the guarantee: cross-check each value against MidFirst's published
2025-Q4 Call Report (FFIEC's public bank-find at https://cdr.ffiec.gov, or the
regulator's published quarterly Income/Condition reports for cert 4063), then
overwrite any divergent value here. After that, this fixture validates ingest
against the regulator's published numbers, not just against the ZIP we parsed.
Keys starting with `_` are ignored by the validator (treated as comments).
